title: Northeast Ohio Energy Costs Are Rising — Here's What Homeowners Can Do
excerpt: Ohio electricity rates hit 17.59 cents/kWh in 2026 and natural gas prices are up 84% since 2020. Here's what's driving the increases and how insulation can cut your bills.

title: 5 Signs Your Home Needs Better Insulation
excerpt: High energy bills, drafty rooms, and ice dams are just a few clues that your insulation may not be doing its job. Here's what to look for and what you can do about it.
